song_name: Vitamin C - Graduation Friends Forever - Maroon 5 - Memories
tuning: Eb Ab Db Gb Bb Eb
content:
[Verse]
[tab]           [ch]C[/ch]                          [ch]G[/ch]
And so we talked all night about the rest of our lives[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                           [ch]E[/ch]
Where we're gonna be when we turn 25[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                           [ch]C[/ch]
I keep thinkin times will never change[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                              [ch]G[/ch]
Keep on thinkin things will always be the same[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]C[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]
But when we leave this year we won't be comin back[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                               [ch]E[/ch]
No more hangin out 'cause we're on a different track[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]F[/ch]                      [ch]C[/ch]
And if you've got something that you need to say[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]F[/ch]                                     [ch]G[/ch]
You better say it right now cause you don't have another day[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]C[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]
'Cause we're movin on and we can't slow down[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am[/ch]                        [ch]E[/ch]
These memories are fadin like a film without sound[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]F[/ch]                        [ch]C[/ch]
And I keep thinkin of that night in June[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]F[/ch]                         [ch]G[/ch]
I didn't know much of love but it came too soon[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]C[/ch]
And there was me and you[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]G[/ch]
And then we got real cool[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                   [ch]E[/ch]
Stay at home talkin on the telephone with me[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                             [ch]C[/ch]
We'd get so excited and we'd get so scared[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                              [ch]G[/ch]
Laughin at ourselves thinkin life's not fair[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]
Here's to the ones that we got[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                 [ch]Em[/ch]
Cheers to the wish you were here but you're not[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]F[/ch]                 [ch]C[/ch]
'Cause the drinks bring back all the memories[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]F[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]
Of everything we've been through[/tab]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]
Toast to the ones here today[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                [ch]Em[/ch]
Toast to the ones that we lost on the way[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]F[/ch]                 [ch]C[/ch]
'Cause the drinks bring back all the memories[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]F[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]                    N.C.
And the memories bring back memories, bring back you[/tab]


[Verse]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]Am[/ch]              [ch]Em[/ch]
There's a time that I remember, when I did not know no pain[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]F[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]F[/ch]                    [ch]G[/ch]
When I believed in forever, and everything would stay the same[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]Em[/ch]
Now my heart feel like December, when somebody say your name[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F[/ch]                  [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]F[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
'Cause I can't reach out to call you, but I know I will one day[/tab]


(nc - let last chord ring out)


And this is how it feels


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]
As we go on[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]E[/ch]
We remember[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]
All the times we[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]
Had together[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]
And as our lives change[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]E[/ch]
Come whatever[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]
We will still be[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]
Friends forever[/tab]


[Verse]
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]Em[/ch]
There's a time that I remember, when I never felt so lost[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]F[/ch]               [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]F[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]
When I felt all of the hatred, was too powerful to stop (ooh yeah)[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]Am[/ch]              [ch]Em[/ch]
Now my heart feel like an ember, and it's lighting up the dark[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]F[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]F[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]
I'll carry these torches for ya, and you know I never drop, yeah[/tab]


[Verse]
[tab]            [ch]C[/ch]                                [ch]G[/ch]
Will we think about tomorrow like we think about now?[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Am[/ch]
Can we survive it out there?[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]E[/ch]
Can we make it somehow?[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                                   [ch]C[/ch]
I guess I thought that this would never end[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                             [ch]G[/ch]
And suddenly it's like we're women and men[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]C[/ch]                           [ch]G[/ch]
Will the past be a shadow that will follow us 'round?[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Am[/ch]                             [ch]E[/ch]
Will these memories fade when I leave this town[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]F[/ch]                      [ch]C[/ch]
I keep, I keep thinking that it's not goodbye[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                         [ch]G[/ch]
Keep on thinking it's a time to fly.[/tab]


[tab][Outro]
[ch]C[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
   Doo-dooo doo-doo-doo-do[/tab]

[ch]F[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]

 La la la la la la la
[tab][ch]F[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]                         [ch]C[/ch]
Memories bring back memories, bring back you[/tab]

 Yeah, yeah, yeah

[tab] [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]
   Doo-dooo doo-doo-doo-do[/tab]

[tab] La la la la la la la
[ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]Em[/ch]
   Doo-doo-do dooo doo-doo-dooo-do[/tab]

[tab]La la la la la la la
[ch]F[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]
   Doo-doo-do-dooo doo-doo-dooo (ooh yeah)[/tab]

 La la la la la la la
